report.summary: Standup v12 ~22:10 CET — 5 agents ran since v11 (21:12): publish-v9 fired Vercel redeploy 8t4MbeTbw (299 pages live, 20-page queue refilled, ETF pages finally live); build-v6 scaffolded Kaito InfoFi + BTCFi guides (in PUBLISH_QUEUE); design-v9 delivered OG images + a11y fixes for ETF pages; community-v12 extended social calendar with Sunday + Saturday content for InfoFi/BTCFi; AICourseRecommendations.tsx apostrophe STILL unpatched (12h+); Bloomberg Screener V3 at 0% code with Monday deadline.

sections.title: Analytics — Delta Since Standup v11 (~21:12 CET)
items: ✅ PUBLISH-V9 (21:19): Vercel deploy 8t4MbeTbw confirmed — 5 Day 29 hub pages live: /exchanges/best, /exchanges/best/beginners, /wallets/best, /wallets/best/beginners, /investing/staking. Published count grew 295 → 299 (+5). CRITICAL: This deploy also pushed previously-pending ETF pages (/learn/altcoin-etf-guide-2026 + /tools/altcoin-etf-tracker) live — the redeploy blocker from v11 is RESOLVED. PUBLISH_QUEUE refilled with 20 high-intent exchange/wallet/DeFi review pages for next batch. 797 total unpublished pages remain in the pipeline.

🏗️ BUILD-V6 (21:34): Two new guides scaffolded and added to PUBLISH_QUEUE — /learn/kaito-ai-infofi-guide (Kaito AI & InfoFi: covers Attention Markets, KAITO token, Polymarket partnership, Yaps → Attention pivot; Polymarket hook timely March 2026) + /learn/btcfi-bitcoin-defi-guide-2026 (BTCFi: $7.1B TVL +2,237% from $304M Jan 2024, Babylon $1.9B native BTC staked, Stacks/sBTC, Rootstock; BTCFiProtocolExplorer.tsx interactive component with 8 protocols filterable by type/risk/EVM). Internal links wired. Article + FAQ schema on both. 0 TS errors on new files.

🎨 DESIGN-V9 (21:35): OG images created for altcoin ETF pages — og-altcoin-etf-guide-2026.svg/.png (SOL/XRP/ETH asset cards, stats panel) + og-altcoin-etf-tracker.svg/.png (mini ETF data table, AUM breakdown chart). Accessibility pass on ETF tracker: focus rings on search/sort/filter, aria-label on search input, aria-sort on table headers, aria-expanded on row expanders, Fragment key fix, smooth-scroll to detail panels on mobile. ToC hover underline on guide page.

📣 COMMUNITY-V12 (21:50 — labeled 2026-03-16): Sunday Mar 15 double-drop tweets drafted (Kaito InfoFi + BTCFi); Kaito standalone tweet (InfoFi × Prediction Markets, Polymarket hook); BTCFi standalone tweet ($7B TVL BTC holder yield angle); BTCFi 6-post Saturday Mar 21 thread drafted; Discord/Telegram drop announcement ready; Thursday Mar 19 newsletter addendum (Kaito + BTCFi sections added). 2 SVG social cards: social-kaito-infofi-guide.svg (attention leaderboard bars, +312% 7d badge) + social-btcfi-guide-2026.svg (TVL protocol breakdown, $304M→$7.1B badge). v11 Mon–Fri posting schedule preserved and extended.

📊 DATA PIPELINES: CoinGecko /api/prices (60s TTL) + DefiLlama /api/defi-yields (300s) operational — confirmed healthy in publish-v9. TTL mismatches persist (4/6 routes) — no user-facing impact. Hardcoded fallback still missing from /api/prices (502 risk on cache+API miss). Rate limiting still 0/6 public data routes.

🔍 GSC DAY 17: Organic indexing window entering final stretch (14–21 day range). BTCFi + InfoFi content published today captures emerging March 2026 query clusters ahead of indexing. DeFAI narrative continues as breakout March 2026 topic. Altcoin ETF staking-yield differentiator (SOL ~6–8% APY vs ETH no-staking) still unique in market.

sections.title: Project Manager — Cycle Delta vs Carry-Overs
items: DEPLOYED ✅ Vercel 8t4MbeTbw: /exchanges/best, /exchanges/best/beginners, /wallets/best, /wallets/best/beginners, /investing/staking — all QA-verified (5/5 H1, metadata, breadcrumbs, mobile). Day 29 group complete.
DEPLOYED ✅ ETF pages now live (confirmed via 8t4MbeTbw post-v11): /learn/altcoin-etf-guide-2026 + /tools/altcoin-etf-tracker — the critical v11 redeploy blocker is RESOLVED.
IN QUEUE ✅ /learn/kaito-ai-infofi-guide + /learn/btcfi-bitcoin-defi-guide-2026 — both in PUBLISH_QUEUE; 20-page batch staged for next publish cycle.
SHIPPED 🎨 OG images for altcoin ETF guide + tracker (SVG + PNG). ETF tracker a11y pass complete (keyboard nav, focus rings, ARIA attributes).
SHIPPED 📣 Community-v12: Sunday drop content live for both new guides; social calendar extended Sun–Sat; 2 social cards; newsletter addendum ready for Thu Mar 19 send.

OPEN 🔴 CRITICAL: AICourseRecommendations.tsx line 96 apostrophe STILL unpatched — 12h+ since first flag. `you're` in single-quoted JSX string → change to {"you're"} or '. Blocks Sprint 59: 176 dApps + courses hub. No programmer cycle has touched this file in 12+ cycles. THIS IS THE #1 BLOCKER.

OPEN 🔴 Bloomberg Screener V3 live data at 0% code progress — Monday community tweet pre-staged claiming live data. Deadline is Monday morning. DefiLlama /api/defi-yields confirmed healthy (300s TTL). 2-hour coding task with hard deadline.
OPEN 🔴 Rate limiting: 0/6 public data routes protected. Organic traffic window opening exactly now.
OPEN 🟡 Vercel Pro trial: ~4 days remaining (was ~5 in v11, linear decay). Billing action from Jefe URGENT.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 Fallback data: 2/6 routes partial. 4 routes unprotected on upstream API failure.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 57 TS errors — AICourseRecommendations.tsx (17) + structured-data.examples.ts (40). No regression.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 10 OG images from prior design cycles need metadata wired in page.tsx files.
BLOCKED [Jefe] 🟡 WalletConnect production Project ID — wallet auth, gamification, referral tracking all gated.
BLOCKED [Jefe] 🟡 GitHub Actions secrets — Playwright CI blocked.
PUBLISH QUEUE: 20 pages staged (exchange/wallet/DeFi reviews). Kaito InfoFi + BTCFi guides also queued. Total 22 pages ready to promote.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — Fix AICourseRecommendations.tsx apostrophe NOW. This 1-line fix has been identified in every standup since v1 and remains unshipped after 12+ hours. The programmer's ONLY task next cycle: open AICourseRecommendations.tsx, find line 96, change the single-quoted string containing `you're` to use `{"you're"}`. Nothing else. Sprint 59 (176 dApps, courses hub, AI recommendations — the largest content batch in the pipeline) is 100% gated on this. Every cycle it stays unshipped compounds the backlog further.

PRIORITY 2 — Ship Sprint 58 Bloomberg Screener V3 live data before Monday. The Monday community announcement ('Live Data is here') is pre-staged. Posting it while the Screener runs on mock data is a credibility failure. Data Engineer: wire DefiLlama live TVL/APY/Volume into the Bloomberg Screener endpoint. Programmer: update Screener V3 component to consume the live feed. Then trigger Vercel deploy. DefiLlama confirmed healthy. This is a 2-hour task with a hard Monday AM deadline — it must start this cycle.

PRIORITY 3 — Rate limit the 6 public data API routes before organic traffic window closes. GSC Day 17 means Google signals are imminent. 0/6 routes are rate-limited — the exact moment traffic spikes is when abuse exposure is highest. Data Engineer: add checkRateLimit (matching /api/health pattern) to /api/prices, /api/fear-greed, /api/trending, /api/market-metrics, /api/market-dominance, /api/defi-yields. Simple pattern, 6 files, deploy. Protect the infrastructure before the window opens.
